reference: Hello, I am a forty-nine-year-old female who has suffered from a bloated stomach, back pain, and now nausea and dizziness for the past three weeks. Two very small gallstones were found on the ultrasound that I had. Could this be causing me so many symptoms? Oh, and I feel breathless just walking up one flight of stairs.
text: Hello, I am a 49-year-old female who has suffered from a bloated stomach, back pain, and now nausea and dizziness for the past 3 weeks. Two very small gallstones were found on the ultrasound that I had. Could this be causing me so many symptoms? Oh, and I feel breathless just. One flight of stairs.
